title: Best Gaming Mice
description: Daily-updated rankings of the best gaming mice, scored on sensor performance, wireless latency, weight, build quality, and value.

competitors.description: Asymmetric pro-grade wireless mouse with HERO 2 sensor at 60g

competitors.description: Ergonomic wireless with Focus X sensor and 64g ultra-light body

competitors.description: Ambidextrous wireless at 82g with 280h battery life

competitors.name: Ninjutso Sora V2 Wireless
competitors.description: Ultra-light ambidextrous at 45g with PixArt PAW3395 sensor

history.commentary: The 2026 wireless gaming mouse market has reached a performance plateau at the top tier, with multiple options offering sub-1ms wireless latency and class-leading sensors. Logitech's G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX remains the esports community's consensus #1 choice, combining the HERO 2 sensor's flawless tracking with an asymmetric shape preferred by most FPS players. Razer's DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed surged to #2 by delivering the beloved ergonomic shape at only 64g with excellent value at $99. The Endgame Gear OP1we stands out at #3 for weight-obsessed users at just 55g. Notable: the Corsair M75 Air climbs to #5 with its 60g frame and Slipstream wireless, displacing the previously popular Fnatic Bolt.
highlights: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX retains #1 as the esports standard
Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed rises to #2 with best ergonomic value
Corsair M75 Air climbs to #5, displacing Fnatic Bolt
Ninjutso Sora V2 at 45g remains the lightest wireless option at #8
Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed offers best value at #4 under $80

history.commentary:
遊戲滑鼠市場在 2026 年 3 月底持續以新技術為競爭焦點。Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike（$179.99，2 月 10 日發布）是業界首款搭載 Haptic Inductive Trigger System（HITS）的遊戲滑鼠，透過磁感應觸發機制提供 10 級觸發點和 5 級快速重置，宣稱可降低最多 30ms 延遲。此滑鼠已搭載 HERO 2 傳感器（44,000 DPI）與 LIGHTSPEED 無線，並以「最快競技點擊」獲得健力士世界紀錄，已有職業電競選手實際使用。與 G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX（本榜 #1）相比，Superstrike 定位於追求觸感反饋的競技玩家，兩者服務不同需求。

Razer Viper V4 Pro 搭載 FrameSync 技術，將滑鼠傳感器掃描週期與 MCU 同步以提升電池效率，Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro 同步上市。此外，Pulsar Gaming 於 3 月 3 日推出與 CS2 職業選手 ZywOo 聯名的限量版滑鼠，全球線上通路開放購買。G-Wolves Lycan 8K（28.8g，PMW-3950，8K 輪詢率）3 月 15 日正式上市，為超輕量市場帶來新選擇。

本榜名次維持穩定，G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 以無懈可擊的 HERO 2 傳感器與 60g 輕量優勢穩守 #1。Ninjutso Sora V2 仍是最輕無線選擇（45g），Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed 繼續以 $79 提供最高性價比。
highlights: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 確認搭載 HITS 磁感應觸發系統，業界首款，已獲健力士世界紀錄
Razer Viper V4 Pro FrameSync 技術正式亮相，電池效率大幅提升
Pulsar Gaming x ZywOo 聯名限量版 3 月 3 日上市，職業電競滑鼠市場持續活躍
G-Wolves Lycan 8K（28.8g，PMW-3950）3 月 15 日上市，超輕量市場新強者
Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed 以 $79 繼續穩居性價比之王 #4

references.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike — The fastest fully customizable click in competitive gaming
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice
